start.speaker: Kiron
start.text: The plains have heard your name. If your road truly turns against Krimora, I will lend it thunder and charge.

joined.speaker: Kiron
joined.text: Then I answer the call. When your line breaks, mine will hit first.

already_joined.speaker: Kiron
already_joined.text: My hooves are already set beside your warpath.

end.speaker: Kiron
end.text: The wind will find you again when the moment is right.
